*[[No-mind]] *[[Original enlightenment]] *[[:en:Buddha-nature|Buddha-nature]] *[[Turning the light around]] *[[:en:Kenshō|Kenshō]] *[[Satori]] *[[Subitism|Sudden awakening]] '''The way'''
*[[Ten Bulls|Ten Ox-Herding Pictures]] *[[:en:Five Ranks|Five Ranks of Tozan]] *[[Hakuin#Four ways of knowing|Hakuin's Four ways of knowing]] *[[:en:Ekayāna|One Vehicle]] '''The "goal"''' *[[:en:Bodhisattva|Bodhisattva ideal]] *[[:en:Buddhahood|Buddhahood]] '''Background''' *[[Zen and Sutras]] *[[:en:Doctrinal background of Zen|Doctrinal background of Zen]] Precepts|Bodhisattva Precepts]] *[[Shikantaza]] *[[Sesshin]] *[[:en:Dharani|Dhāraṇī]] *[[Walking meditation]] *[[Nianfo]] Chan *[[:en:Koan|Koan]] *[[:en:Hua Tou|Hua Tou]] *[[Samu (Zen)]] poetry]] *[[:en:Hitsuzendō|Zen calligraphy]] | list4title = [[Zen scriptures|Zen scripture]] | list4 = '''''Indian Mahayana texts''''' *[[Prajnaparamita#Texts|Prajñaparamita sutras]] *[[Laṅkāvatāra Sūtra|Lankavatara Sutra]] *[[:en:Śrīmālādevī Siṃhanāda Sūtra|Śrīmālādevī Sūtra]] *[[Lotus Sutra]] *[[Vimalakirti Sutra]] *[[:en:Buddhāvataṃsaka Sūtra|Avatamsaka Sutra]] *[[Mahāyāna Mahāparinirvāṇa Sūtra|Mahaparinirvana Sutra]] '''''Chinese texts''''' *[[Long Scroll of the Treatise on the Two Entrances and Four Practices|Two Entrances and Four Practices]] *[[:en:Śūraṅgama Sūtra|Śūraṅgama Sūtra]] *[[:en:Awakening of Faith in the Mahayana|The Awakening of Faith]] *[[Sutra of Perfect Enlightenment]] *[[Platform Sutra]] *[[:en:Anthology of the Patriarchal Hall|Anthology of the Patriarchal Hall]] school|Oxhead school]] *[[:en:Heze school|Heze school]] *[[:en:Hongzhou school|Hongzhou school]] *[[:en:Five Houses of Chán|Five Houses of Chán]] *[[Chan Buddhism#Tibetan Chan|Tibetan Chan]] *[[Trúc Lâm]] *[[Plum Village Tradition]] *[[Order of Interbeing]] *[[:en:Jogye Order|Jogye Order]] *[[:en:Kwan Um School of Zen|Kwan Um School of Zen]] *[[Taego Order]] *[[Rinzai school]] *[[Sōtō|Sōtō school]] *[[:en:Ōbaku|Ōbaku school]] *[[Sanbo Kyodan]] *[[White Plum Asanga]] *[[Ordinary Mind Zen School]] *[[Zen Peacemakers]] | list6title = Persons | list6 = '''Chán in China'''
'''''Classical''''' *[[:en:Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma]] *[[:en:Daman Hongren|Hongren]] *[[Yuquan Shenxiu|Shenxiu]] *[[:en:Huineng|Huineng (Enō)]] *[[Shenhui]] *[[Mazu Daoyi|Mazu Daoyi (Baso)]] *[[Shitou Xiqian|Shitou Xiqian (Kisen)]] *[[:en:Huangbo Xiyun|Huangbo]] *[[:en:Dongshan Liangjie|Dongshan Liangjie (Tozan)]] *[[Xuefeng Yicun|Xuefeng Yicun (Seppo)]] *[[Linji Yixuan|Linji Yixuan (Rinzai)]] *[[:en:Guifeng Zongmi|Zongmi]] *[[Yunmen Wenyan|Yunmen Wenyan (Ummon Bun'en)]] *[[Yongming Yanshou]] *[[:en:Dahui Zonggao|Dahui Zonggao (Tahui)]] '''''Post-classical''''' *[[Zhongfeng Mingben]] *[[:en:Hanshan Deqing|Hanshan Deqing]] '''''Contemporary''''' *[[Taixu]] *[[Xu Yun]] *[[Sheng-yen]] '''Zen in Japan''' * [[:en:Eisai|Eisai]] * [[:en:Bassui Tokushō|Bassui]] * [[:en:Ikkyū|Ikkyū]] * [[:en:Bankei|Bankei]] * [[:en:Hakuin Ekaku|Hakuin Ekaku]] * [[:en:Dōgen|Dōgen]] '''Seon in Korea''' *[[Taego Bou]] *[[:en:Jinul|Jinul]] *[[:en:Daewon|Daewon]] *[[Seongcheol]] '''Thiền in Vietnam''' *[[Trần Thái Tông]] *[[Trần Nhân Tông]] *[[Thích Thanh Từ]] *[[Thích Nhất Hạnh]] *[[Thích Thiên-Ân]] '''Western Zen''' *[[:en:D. T. Suzuki|D. T. Suzuki]] *[[:en:Hakuun Yasutani|Hakuun Yasutani]] *[[Taizan Maezumi]] *[[Shunryū Suzuki]] *[[:en:Hsuan Hua|Hsuan Hua]] *[[Seungsahn]] *[[Sokei-an]] ''[[:Category:Zen Buddhists|Category: Zen Buddhists]]'' | list7title = Institution | list7 = *[[Dharma transmission]] *[[Zen lineage charts]] *[[Zen Ranks and hierarchy]] *[[Zen organisation and institutions]] *[[Zen Narratives]] | list8title = Related schools | list8 = *[[:en:East Asian Mādhyamaka|Sānlùn]] *[[:en:East Asian Yogācāra|Wéishí]] *[[:en:Huayan|Huayan]] *[[Tiantai]] *[[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon]] *[[Tendai]] *[[Pure Land Buddhism]] }}{{documentation}}

*[[:en:No-mind|No-mind]] *[[:en:Original enlightenment|Original enlightenment]] *[[:en:Buddha-nature|Buddha-nature]] *[[Turning the light around]] *[[:en:Kenshō|Kenshō]] *[[Satori]] *[[Subitism|Sudden awakening]] '''The way'''
*[[Ten Bulls|Ten Ox-Herding Pictures]] *[[:en:Five Ranks|Five Ranks of Tozan]] *[[Hakuin#Four ways of knowing|Hakuin's Four ways of knowing]] *[[:en:Ekayāna|One Vehicle]] '''The "goal"''' *[[:en:Bodhisattva|Bodhisattva ideal]] *[[:en:Buddhahood|Buddhahood]] '''Background''' *[[Zen and Sutras]] *[[:en:Doctrinal background of Zen|Doctrinal background of Zen]] Precepts|Bodhisattva Precepts]] *[[Shikantaza]] *[[Sesshin]] *[[:en:Dharani|Dhāraṇī]] *[[:en:Walking meditation|Walking meditation]] *[[:en:Nianfo|Nianfo]] Chan *[[:en:Koan|Koan]] *[[:en:Hua Tou|Hua *[[Prajnaparamita#Texts|Prajñaparamita sutras]] *[[:en:Laṅkāvatāra Sūtra|Lankavatara Sutra]] *[[:en:Śrīmālādevī Siṃhanāda Sūtra|Śrīmālādevī Sūtra]] *[[:en:en:Lotus Sutra|en:Lotus Sutra]] Two Entrances and Four Practices|Two Entrances and Four Practices]] *[[:en:Śūraṅgama Sūtra|Śūraṅgama Sūtra]] *[[:en:Awakening of Faith in the Mahayana|The Awakening of Faith]] *[[Sutra of Perfect the Lamp]] | list5title = Traditions | list5 = *[[:en:East Mountain Teaching|East Mountain Teaching]] *[[Sanjiejiao]] *[[:en:Oxhead school|Oxhead school]] *[[:en:Heze school|Heze school]] *[[:en:Hongzhou school|Hongzhou school]] *[[:en:Five Houses of Chán|Five Houses of Chán]] *[[Chan Buddhism#Tibetan Chan|Tibetan Chan]] *[[Trúc Lâm]] *[[:en:Plum Village Tradition|Plum Village list6 = '''Chán in China'''

T. Suzuki|D. T. Suzuki]] *[[:en:Hakuun Yasutani|Hakuun Yasutani]] *[[Taizan Maezumi]] *[[Shunryū Suzuki]] *[[:en:Hsuan Hua|Hsuan Hua]] *[[Seungsahn]] *[[Sokei-an]] ''[[:Category:Zen Buddhists|Category: Zen Buddhists]]'' | list7title = Institution | list7 = *[[Dharma transmission]] *[[Zen lineage charts]] *[[Zen Ranks and hierarchy]] *[[Zen organisation and institutions]] *[[Zen Narratives]] | list8title = Related schools | list8 = *[[:en:East Asian Mādhyamaka|Sānlùn]] *[[:en:East Asian Yogācāra|Wéishí]] *[[:en:Huayan|Huayan]] *[[Tiantai]] *[[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon]] *[[Tendai]] *[[:en:Pure Land Buddhism|Pure Land Buddhism]] }}{{documentation}}
